titleStmt.title: SII 26.161: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 161. (A.R. No. 153 of 1909.) SAṄGRĀMANALLŪR, UDUMALAIPET TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription is damaged in some places. It contained also other particulars of date but owing to the damage suffered by the record, all that remains of these is the 5th tithi of the bright half of the month.

It records the sale of land by public auction held at Kēraḷakēsarinallūr in Karaivaḻi-nāḍu. It states that the land belonged to maṉṟādi Vilāḍattaraiyaṉ of the above-mentioned place and that the sale by auction was intended to pay off the fine imposed on him for the destruction he caused to the treasury of the god Tiruvālanduṟai-uḍaiyār. It is stated that the land was purchased for 10(1/2) achchus by a certain Kaṇṇabhaṭṭan, a servant of the temple of Vīrachōḷīśvaramuḍaiyār, on behalf of the temple treasury.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
[svastiśrī . vira] nārāyaṇadevaṟku yāṇṭu Eṭṭāvatu mati nāḷ pakkam pañcamiyum kiḻamai poḻutu mu nāḷitu paru
va kkaraivaḻināṭṭu keraḷakecarinallūr maṉṟattiruntu ceyta nilappiramāṇa Ōlai Āvatu tiruvālantuṟai Uṭaiyār śrī Ivvūr maṉ
ṟāṭi vilāṭattaraiyaneṉ tiruvālantuṟai Uṭaiyār paṇṭārattai Aḻiccamaiyil Iṟukka Uṇṇāmaiyāl ko viruḷa Orukālāvatu Iru kālā
vatu mukkālāvatu muṟkūṟa piṟkūṟi Ammoḻi keṭṭu Etirmoḻi kuṭuttu koḷveneṉṟukoṇ koḻumattu Uṭaiyār viracoḷiccaramuṭai
yār paṇṭārattukku cikāriyam ceyvārkaḷil kaṇṇapaṭṭanen paṇṭārattukku koḷveneṉṟu koṇṭa laiyāvatu kiḻakkellai periyapiḷḷai
Āḻvār toṭṭattukku meṟkum teṉpāl Āṟṟukku vaṭakkum melpāṟku nampi paṭṭaṉukkum kocci kuṉṟiṉukkum ku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟku cera kulamāṇi
kka pallavaraiyaṉ toṭṭattukkum peṟṟānāyakaṉ toṭṭattukku meṟpaṭiyāṉ veliyāka Iṭṭa matiḷukku teṟkum Ivvicainta perunāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa teva
ttukku Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷāvatu taṉ ṟaku tu Accu
pattaraiyum vilai Āvaṇakkaḷatte Otikaikkoṇṭu vilaikkaṟa viṟṟup poruḷaṟak koṇṭu vilaippiramāṇam ceytuñ lai Oṟṟi kuṭuttom
Ivvaccu pattaraikkuc ci tirunārāyaṇapurattāḻvāṉ cantiyātipam Oṉṟukku Acciraṇṭum Ikkoyilil devaraṭiyāḷ tiruvinnaṅkai cantiyātīpa m Oṉṟu
kku Acciraṇṭum perumāḷ vira yātipam Oṉṟukku muta Oṉṟa mā yakki Oṉṟum Āka Accu Āṟu nikki tata
ṉa nālum paṇam Eḻum ko
Digital edition of SII 26.161 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
